name: AI Customizer Manager
description: Creates, improves, versions, and classifies customs in the AI Customizer catalog.

versions.changelog: Initial release — catalog-aware manager for skills, agents, and patches.

Project inference from cwd (suggestion mode); patch auto-detection with .original baseline + blocking validations; gentle-ai detection via <!-- gentle-ai:* --> tag scan; guided exploration protocol (no subagent delegation, read-only outside write scope); agent creation collaborative checklist (Paso 2.10).
